ideation: This animation sequence for the nazar amulet emoji (🧿) will focus on a protective gesture. The robot will gently raise its hands in a circular motion, mimicking the amulet's shape and suggesting a warding-off action. The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the protective aspect. The sequence will begin with the arms at rest and end with them returning to a relaxed position. The sequence will use both arms in a coordinated, symmetrical way, to reflect the amulet's balanced nature.  The arms will move in a circular motion, starting low and moving upward before returning to the starting position. This mirrors the shape of the nazar amulet itself and suggests a protective gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang low, ready to ward off evil
hands rise and begin to circle outward
arms sweep up and around, forming a protective shield
the protective circle completes its motion
arms return to rest, the ward is complete
